name: lms
description: B2B LMS — live lessons + workbook + AI assistant (monorepo)

scripts.build: npm run build --workspace=@lms/shared && npm run build --workspace=@lms/api && npm run build --workspace=@lms/web
scripts.build:backend: npm run build --workspace=@lms/shared && npm run build --workspace=@lms/api
scripts.build:web: npm run build --workspace=@lms/shared && npm run build --workspace=@lms/web
